parameters.jsCode:
// Test data configuration for Bluesky workflow
// Many ID fields below are intentionally empty and will cause specific tests to fail.
// To enable full testing, populate these IDs with real values.

return [{ json: {
  handle: 'example.bsky.social',
  did: 'did:plc:example',
  actors: 'example.bsky.social',
  postText: `Comprehensive test post ${new Date().toISOString()}`,
  replyText: `Reply test ${new Date().toISOString()}`,
  quoteText: `Quote test ${new Date().toISOString()}`,
  searchQuery: 'n8n',
  feedUri: 'at://did:plc:example/app.bsky.feed.generator/example',
  feedUris: 'at://did:plc:example/app.bsky.feed.generator/example',
  postUri: '',
  postCid: '',
  postUris: '',
  likeUri: '',
  repostUri: '',
  followUri: '',
  blockUri: '',
  listName: 'n8n Test List',
  listDescription: 'Automated test list',
  listPurpose: 'app.bsky.graph.defs#curatelist',
  listUserDid: 'did:plc:example',
  listUri: '',
  listItemUri: '',
  requestTransferJson: '{}',
  labelsJson: '{"labels":[{"src":"did:plc:example","uri":"at://did:plc:example/app.bsky.feed.post/example","val":"test","cts":"2024-01-01T00:00:00Z"}]}',
  uriPatterns: 'at://did:plc:example/app.bsky.feed.post/*',
  lexiconUrl: 'https://bsky.social/xrpc/com.atproto.sync.getRepo',
  moderationSubject: '',
  moderationSubjectCid: '',
  moderationReasonType: 'com.atproto.moderation.defs#reasonSpam',
  moderationReason: 'Automated test report',
  repo: 'example.bsky.social',
  collection: 'app.bsky.feed.post',
  recordJson: '{"$type":"app.bsky.feed.post","text":"Repo record from n8n","createdAt":"2024-01-01T00:00:00Z"}',
  repoRkey: 'n8n-test-record',
  writesJson: '[]',
  appPasswordName: 'n8n-test',
  inviteUseCount: 1,
  inviteForAccount: '',
  rotateSigningKeyBody: '',
  chatConvoId: '',
  chatMessageId: '',
  chatMessageText: 'Hello from n8n',
  chatMembers: 'did:plc:example1,did:plc:example2',
  syncDid: 'did:plc:example',
  syncCollection: 'app.bsky.feed.post',
  syncRkey: 'example',
  syncCid: 'bafyreiexample',
  syncHostname: 'bsky.social'
}}];

parameters.description: Profile update from n8n comprehensive workflow

parameters.uris: ={{ $items('25 Post Create', 0, 0)[0]?.json?.uri ? $items('25 Post Create', 0, 0)[0].json.uri : $items('01 Test Data', 0, 0)[0].json.postUris }}

parameters.rkey: ={{ $items('60 Repo Create Record', 0, 0)[0]?.json?.uri ? $items('60 Repo Create Record', 0, 0)[0].json.uri.split('/').pop() : $items('01 Test Data', 0, 0)[0].json.repoRkey }}
={{ $items('60 Repo Create Record', 0, 0)[0]?.json?.uri ? $items('60 Repo Create Record', 0, 0)[0].json.uri.split('/').pop() : $items('01 Test Data', 0, 0)[0].json.repoRkey }}
